title: Apply Dark/Light Theme to GoJS ERD Diagrams
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing ERD diagrams, I want the diagram to respect my chosen dark or light theme, so that the diagram is readable and visually consistent with the rest of the application.
description:
The GoJS-powered ERD (Entity Relationship Diagram) does not adapt to the user's selected dark/light theme from the Branding settings. The diagram needs to switch its color scheme based on the branding theme selection.

## Changes
- Detect the current theme (dark or light) from branding settings
- Apply corresponding color scheme to the GoJS diagram (background, node colors, text colors, lines)
acceptance_criteria: GoJS ERD diagram respects the dark/light theme selected in Branding settings
Diagram background adapts to the selected theme
Node colors, text, and lines are readable in both dark and light modes
Theme changes apply without requiring a page reload
ux_changes: GoJS ERD diagram now adapts its color scheme (background, nodes, text, lines) based on the dark/light theme selected in Branding settings.
implementation_notes: GoJS diagram theme configuration updated to read the current branding theme (dark/light) and apply the corresponding color palette to the diagram model.
